anchors.1: Doesn't map to any active thesis
anchors.3: Adjacent to a thesis but not core
anchors.5: Squarely in one or more thesis clusters

anchors.1: Linear business — revenue scales with headcount
anchors.5: Clear flywheel: data, network effect, switching cost, or regulatory moat

anchors.1: Timing is unclear or the market is mature
anchors.3: Tailwind exists but may be cyclical
anchors.5: Durable policy, technology, or cost-curve shift with multi-year runway

anchors.3: Neutral — doesn't improve or worsen portfolio concentration
anchors.5: Fills a gap in thesis coverage, vintage diversity, stage balance, or GP relationship breadth
Obvious why this team builds this thing — domain, technical, or operating edge

anchors.3: Reasonable burn but milestones are far
anchors.5: Lean path to meaningful proof points

anchors.3: Model exists but unproven (stage-adjusted: Pre-Seed/Seed LOIs and pilots count)
anchors.5: Revenue model is legible and early signals confirm it (stage-adjusted)

anchors.1: Feature lead only — no structural moat
anchors.5: Hard-to-replicate advantage: proprietary data, physics, or structural lock-in
Tier 1 GP lead or direct founder relationship
